# utilities — android-talenta

| Pattern | Description |
|---|---|
| `date_service` | Centralized date formatting/parsing abstraction — not yet catalogued; add DateTimeFormatter patterns when established. |
| `helper_extensions` | Extension functions in `core/extensions/` — String, Number, Date, View, Context, RxJava extensions. |
| `logger` | Centralized logging abstraction — not yet catalogued; add Timber wrapper when established. |
| `storage_service` | Interface-based key-value persistence — not yet catalogued; add SharedPreferences/EncryptedSharedPreferences abstraction when established. |
